title: Michael Guerriero
compiled_truth: Michael Guerriero is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-20 to 2002-01-11), Michael Guerriero sent 24 and received 130 emails, totalling 154 interactions. Top correspondents: [Joe Kishkill](people/joe-kishkill) (10), [Andrea Calo](people/andrea-calo) (9), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (7), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (6), [Patrick Hansen](people/patrick-hansen) (5).
